articles.title: Extreme Heat in Kuchinda | Temperature Crosses 40°C | Odisha Heatwave Ground Report - Kanak News Odisha
articles.full_text:
The intense heatwave along with high humidity is severely affecting daily life in Kuchinda, Sambalpur district. With temperatures crossing 40°C, stepping outside has become difficult for residents. Day by day, the rising heat is causing discomfort and distress among people.
#OdishaHeatwave #Kuchinda #Sambalpur #HeatwaveIndia #WeatherNews #GroundReport #SummerHeat #OdishaNews
